name: Trump Headquarters
subject: re: You’re invited
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
We’re sending it to the White House TONIGHT. |
---
| | | Peter,

_We wanted to be sure you knew about this before we sent a list to the President._

Because of coordinated efforts by deeply entrenched bureaucrats to bring down President Trump and this Administration, we **MUST** ensure that we have every resource needed to fight back.

That's why, as loyal supporter, you've been invited to become a member of the 2017 President's Trust.

---
**THE PRESIDENT 'S TRUST 2017** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f9fd0b3b3dab1a43e6fd6874bbe79ac5d394041637f869d8334344a6e1471d017e04d04e22377eba894a84c85f394d81b05b55f654d473f3)** **2017 President 's Trust Membership:** **PENDING****Deadline: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** [** ACCEPT MEMBERSHIP**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c1a33e560d7102865608b91a80c82f3d1617a993a80e141e1a5811a62a07f7daa467fb93327945572b162a924e773f273)

---
| The time for action is now, Peter.

**[Please accept your invitation by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to join the 2017 President's Trust with a generous contribution of $1.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c95c62093ebced2425e2324d00afa1d769919a610ab544b7c8a02102b83aef3be483f48104ba7da90bb79294f871115c8)**
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283cbda64f9149602c50e1ab3a56b1fc23b03f73646a726ef85c212786b734247a716b0ef495bcd526e328ab3c302fabc3f1) **We 're sending a list of inaugural 2017 President's Trust donors to the White House, so be sure your name is on it with a contribution before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP
[CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c42594397cbd3dc1ed41064357277659c7c3a5a2f51590a6af47a4dcc4dac19515ae615f0808c2f94bd85efba3f9fcaed)

**\---------- Forwarded Message ----------**
From: Newt Gingrich
Date: August 10, 2017
Subject: You're invited
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c9b5ac8565d60890121725fc6f7a8ca79727073e7c785c9750fe46473f55fcaf27327e609f37fa7e97bb839043bbba481)**

---
Peter,

The coordinated effort to sabotage President Trump by deeply entrenched bureaucrats and an out-of-control news media is something you'd expect from other countries -- _not America._

The time for action is now. We must ensure that President Trump has the support he needs throughout his entire presidency.

Which is why I'm calling your attention to the 2017 President's Trust -- a _reserve_ of funds for targeted ads, true emergencies, and critical grassroots programs.

I'm inviting you, a loyal supporter, to join as a member.
---
| **[Please accept your invitation to become a member of the 2017 President's Trust by Saturday, August 12, 2017 with a generous contribution of $35 or more.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283cf4f1cbe805e6e410b0bba95718faff1526cd6f3b2090a7198b0592152f5ef514eacde23f019b41dec0bb50e170d57aaf)**
[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c3e6519511cf17ee9f0594c299040820defadbe8f6b4cd580f9d4eef710d10ff6c280ded9fc5a7c1ac23ae9fe9f2c9377) [CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c1bc085020ced806e283b5b8b2ba4910901839f65124db2d5efc0291a91bd5628ea49f21e367d9e19fa0fe6a00ead7a7c) [CONTRIBUTE $75](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283c0a3bbeca202a8a6d5c0d71e8938ede0d0537b0669d79c53220a3c76cd1b8b8a828be5ccdd9ef4e027fe60e94228c6b62) [CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=963c50484da8283ca417e71dc16a5a84141c92cb19e6df657cbdcea096f901adbf14165468d8e72e11c6ff3929619233f3a27bcc52912c77) [CONTRIBUTE $35](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b6242cb7ee514b146458b90661381853e6ceefc8bf28192524fcb546f4c965adecdd4e3f5b3d919f63ea220846b7013d0) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b3f4b8170fd63d8ed45f1e6c0d94d2e7d14e3901533d6d04ae4977f114649ed9ee0bf3dafa21071bd245b2f50f0a7c6ca) The President's Trust has been around for past Republican presidents, but I can't think of a time when it was more desperately needed.

It's extraordinary. We're just over six months in to Trump's presidency, but the fix is already in to take him down.

When you have a producer of a major media outlet admit that President Trump is "probably right" to call the phony Russia story a witch-hunt -- but continue to push it 24/7 to boost ratings -- we have a real problem in our country.

What we achieved in November was remarkable. The world watched the American people take their country back. We cannot let what we've achieved collapse.

The time to act is now.

**[Please accept your invitation by Saturday, August 12, 2017 to join the 2017 President's Trust with a generous contribution of $35 or more.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b9f56152be1a7eaee5616f03c98d701316fd17e5603a515a28e466ea913c3b3995ca6b209cbe39f078d9505b844dccfe5)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b3664f0936e38706e965874357c47f262cc120ac666a2d923415ea5d2460d19ca3eb6fd396efe368d2ba7ff09b694f7f5)
Newt Gingrich [CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b368fdeb6a7c1f3d9937493c1b9288bdc6c8972cb407bca8dd4814e2a13046eb5d9bb8e3a5a0365289df2316ba682f2ae)
---

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445bf996fac2ac956e430f90eb85826ddecea80da719bbd5c118f1e2d7e2048346adbb6df2f72e3691e4117b7cebb5ef4ffe) You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f113a4040be1445b8ec5db7721f6ea2355078a67ef69c0bcdba2a00c81e6664a57bdacc5ceec3185f3a2d1124c4899b6979d985408084452) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22abaa7aa2e8b6d40979311bbf0ec5a2b31ebc33386dfd4130faa3b49ba86a3c135807c6cf84d063822586fc30e7c3cf40e3) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d48465206bcd088e8478d21b83e709e80a878f69e9708b49e3b85e60ae10987d8eb8a)
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: We need to make sure Trump doesn't rescind DACA. Sign on if you're with us.
body:
Republicans want to eliminate Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals protections for young immigrants.
---
**Add your name to stand with immigrants -- tell Trump not to eliminate DACA.

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-with-Immigrants1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd")**

Derek --

When Congress returns from recess next month, Republicans will get to work trying to rescind DACA, President Obama's protections for undocumented immigrants who were brought to the U.S. as children. Some Republican attorneys general have even threatened to take Trump to court if he doesn't end DACA before Labor Day.

**[We have to match the pressure coming from the far-right wing of the GOP. Make sure Trump and his allies in Congress hear us loud and clear -- do not rescind DACA.](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Stand-with-Immigrants1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+have+to+match+the+pressure+coming+fro&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd")**

Immigrants are the heart and soul of our country. If Donald Trump ends DACA, hundreds of thousands of young people will be at risk of deportation -- being ripped away from their families and, for many, forced out of the only country they've ever called home.

**Stand with our immigrant neighbors today. Join Democrats and tell Trump not to rescind DACA:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stand-with-Immigrants1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd")**
Thanks for taking action,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052372a/4067b0a/3c22dafd0/7e6f544c/2688653770/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052372a/4067b0a/3c22dafd0/7e6f544d/2688653770/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052372a/4067b0a/3c22dafd0/7e6f544a/2688653770/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052372a/4067b0a/3c22dafd0/7e6f544b/2688653770/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170812_tp_nd&source=em_20170812_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Some Republican attorneys general have even threatened to take Trump to court if he doesn't end DACA before Labor Day. "" Immigrants are the heart and soul of our country. If Donald Trump ends DACA, hundreds of thousands of young people will be at risk of deportation -- being ripped away from their families and, for many, forced out of the only country they've ever called home. Stand with our immigrant neighbors today. name: survey@teamryan.com
subject: What matters most to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
****

What is most important to you, Friend?

With increasing threats to our national security, is defense your priority?

Is it bringing jobs back to America and strengthening our economy?

Or is it tax reform?

_**We want to know what matters to you -- **_[_**take our issues survey here >>**_](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzAxMzUwNjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMTE5Njk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Let's make our voices heard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We have to keep up the pressure. Right now, the House and Senate Redistricting Committees are meeting to discuss their next steps for redrawing their unconstitutionally gerrymandered maps.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202dcc/2fde7c66/4546e94c/1569642b/1315969643/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-it-s-time-for-fair-electoral-maps?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---
We have to keep up the pressure, Friend.

Republican leaders in the General Assembly just announced their plans to use partisan politics, protect incumbents and essentially ignore the federal Voting Rights Act as they begin their court ordered legislative map drawing process.

Last week at a public hearing, North Carolina residents stood up for fairer maps and demanded more transparency from Republican legislative leaders.

The criteria Republican leaders announced today not only disregards the people of North Carolina, but doubles down on partisan political games.

**[This is too important -- add your name today to let Republican legislative leaders know that you want fair maps drawn.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202dcc/2fde7c66/4546e94c/1569642a/1315969643/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-it-s-time-for-fair-electoral-maps?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+This+is+too+important++add+your+name+tod&utm_campaign=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

Our voice is powerful here -- especially when we come together.

We can't afford to let Republican legislative leaders off the hook here. If they draw unfair maps, it will impact not only 2018 races, but the 2020 races as well.

North Carolina's future elections are at stake.

**[Let's make sure they hear us. Add your name here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202dcc/2fde7c66/4546e94c/1569642d/1315969643/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-it-s-time-for-fair-electoral-maps?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Lets+make+sure+they+hear+us+Add+your+nam&utm_campaign=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc")**

Thanks for all you continue to do,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202dcc/2fde7c66/4546e94c/1569642c/1315969643/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWYVNWQWxKUT09IjoiMjg0NTcifQ==/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/add-your-name-it-s-time-for-fair-electoral-maps?&firstname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=28457&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr&utm_campaign=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc&source=em17_170811_fairmaps_adv_gq_ful__rc")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States
